display.name: Ledger Beneath the Ash Tree
display.short_description: A waxed ledger hangs from a nail in the ash bark. Someone kept careful count here, then left in a hurry.

choices.label: Break the seal and check the purse
choices.summary: A small payment was tucked into the ledger fold for someone who never came back.

choices.label: Copy the tally marks and route notes
choices.summary: The careful handwriting sketches a few safe habits the road keeps rewarding.
